name: SignaturePad

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Export format for the emitted data URL. "png" is the default (universal browser support, transparent backgrounds). "svg" produces a real vector export: the JS pad records each pointer path and replays it as <path> elements, so the signature scales crisply at any size. (A signature loaded from an existing raster data URL has no vector data to export and falls back to PNG.)

mdSummary:
# SignaturePad

Signature Pad component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/signature-pad

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SignaturePad | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | Width | `int` | `500` |  |
| SignaturePad | Height | `int` | `200` |  |
| SignaturePad | StrokeColor | `string` | `"currentColor"` |  |
| SignaturePad | StrokeWidth | `double` | `2.0` |  |
| SignaturePad | BackgroundColor | `string` | `"transparent"` |  |
| SignaturePad | ShowClearButton | `bool` | `true` |  |
| SignaturePad | ShowDownloadButton | `bool` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | Format | `string` | `"png"` | Export format for the emitted data URL. "png" is the default (universal browser support, transparent backgrounds). "svg" produces a real vector export: the JS pad records each pointer path and replays it as <path> elements, so the signature scales crisply at any size. (A signature loaded from an existing raster data URL has no vector data to export and falls back to PNG.) |
| SignaturePad | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | OnSign | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | OnClear | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | Placeholder | `string?` | `"Sign here"` |  |
| SignaturePad | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SignaturePad | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `OnSign` (`EventCallback`)
- `OnClear` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDownAsync handles Escape in SignaturePad.razor
- `Delete` — HandleKeyDownAsync handles Delete in SignaturePad.razor
- `Backspace` — HandleKeyDownAsync handles Backspace in SignaturePad.razor

## Example
```razor
<SignaturePad />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`
